A large-scale empirical study across eight state-of-the-art LLMs demonstrates that Code-MUE achieves a strong negative correlation with functional correctness (Spearman's correlation up to -0.98), significantly outperforming lexical and embedding-based baselines while enabling robust risk detection and selective prediction in practical workflows.
articles.comment: To appear at The ACM SIGSOFT International Symposium on Software Testing and Analysis (ISSTA) 2026
articles.titleCn: 基于执行的语义交互图测量代码大型语言模型的不确定性——Code-MUE
articles.abstractCn: 随着代码大型语言模型（LLMs）在现代软件工程中日益核心，其固有的随机性带来了严峻的现实风险，即便是微小的错误也可能导致严重的功能、安全或安全后果。因此，可靠的自动化需要能够区分有信心、有充分支持的预测和随机猜测。然而，现有的不确定性估计方法存在一个关键缺陷：白盒和灰盒技术通常不适用于闭源模型，而标准的“黑盒”文本指标无法捕捉代码的独特脆弱性，因为句法差异并不总是意味着语义分歧。为了弥合句法-语义差距，我们引入了Code-MUE，这是一个纯粹的黑盒框架，通过基于执行的语义交互图来衡量不确定性。与依赖表面文本相似性的先前方法不同，Code-MUE将不确定性建立在可观察的运行时行为之上，通过计算解空间的冯·诺依曼熵来量化全局语义多样性。一项跨越八种最先进的LLMs的大规模实证研究表明，Code-MUE与功能正确性呈强负相关（Spearman相关系数高达-0.98），显著优于基于词汇和嵌入的基线，同时能够在实际工作流程中实现稳健的风险检测和选择性预测。

articles.title: On-Device Deep Research at 4B: Exposure Bounds Faithfulness, Retrieval Bounds Coverage
articles.abstract: On-device research agents search a corpus, read sources, and write a cited brief on a personal laptop. Whether their citations are faithful, and at what cost, is unmeasured for a deployable small model. This study fixes one 4B generator on a 24 GB laptop and asks what makes its citations faithful. It separates two quantities usually reported as one number. Cited claim faithfulness asks whether the cited source supports the claim. Trustworthy coverage asks whether the agent also cites the right sources. The study crosses how much of each source the generator sees, 400 against 1500 characters, with the quality of the sources supplied, gold papers against retrieved papers. Two levers fall out, and they act on different outcomes. Exposure sets faithfulness. More of each source lifts faithfulness from 0.45 to 0.58 on retrieved sources and from 0.37 to 0.58 on gold sources, and the two settings converge, so faithfulness is bound by exposure, not by whether the source is correct. The exposure lift is robust to a second, independent judge; the exact convergence is tight under the primary judge and only approximate under the second. Retrieval sets coverage. Trustworthy coverage stays near 0.22 on retrieved sources at any exposure, because recall is held near 0.40, so exposure cannot fix which sources are cited. The extra exposure costs about 235 output tokens. The practical recipe is to raise per source exposure first, cheaply, and then treat retrieval recall as the only remaining lever.
articles.titleCn: 在4B设备上的深度研究：曝光界限忠实度，检索界限覆盖率
articles.abstractCn: 设备上的研究代理会搜索语料库、阅读资料，并在个人笔记本电脑上撰写带有引用的简短报告。对于可部署的小模型而言，其引用的忠实程度以及所付出的代价尚未得到衡量。本研究将一个4B生成器固定在24GB的笔记本电脑上，探究其引用为何会保持忠实。研究将通常被报告为一个数字的两个量进行了区分：引用声明忠实度询问所引用的资料是否支持该声明，而可信覆盖度询问代理是否引用了正确的资料。研究交叉了生成器看到的每种资料的比例（400字符与1500字符），以及所提供的资料质量（金论文与检索到的论文）。由此产生了两个杠杆，它们作用于不同的结果。曝光度决定了忠实度。更多的每种资料将忠实度从0.45提升到0.58（针对检索到的资料）和从0.37提升到0.58（针对金论文），且两种设置趋于一致，因此忠实度受限于曝光度，而非资料是否正确。曝光度的提升对第二个独立的评判者依然稳健；在主要评判者下，精确的趋于紧密，而在第二个评判者下仅近似。检索度决定了覆盖度。在任何曝光度下，可信覆盖度在检索到的资料上保持在0.22左右，因为召回率被维持在0.40左右，所以曝光度无法决定引用哪些资料。额外的曝光度成本约等于235个输出token。实际操作方法是首先以低成本提高每条资料的曝光度，然后将检索召回率视为唯一剩余的杠杆。

articles.title: FinResearchBench II: A Deep Research Benchmark with Consensus-Derived Gold Rubrics for Distinguishing Financial Report Quality
articles.abstract: Deep research agents are increasingly used to produce long-form financial reports, yet large-scale evaluation remains bottlenecked by the need for human experts to define and execute high-quality rubrics. We address this problem by proposing a scalable pipeline for generating high-quality rubrics without human experts in the final loop. We build a financial deep research benchmark from 104 real-world user queries and automatically synthesize 14,450 query-specific candidate rubrics from model-generated reports. To justify removing human experts from rubric execution, we compare rubric judgments from three human experts with those from a three-LLM judge panel on a sampled subset, and show that LLM-based evaluation is sufficiently consistent with human evaluation to replace it for large-scale rubric screening, including 98.67\% label-level agreement on jointly unanimous items. We then derive consensus-derived gold rubrics through two filters: a strict consistency filter, which keeps a rubric only if the three LLM judges unanimously agree on every report under the same query, and a distinguishability filter, which keeps a rubric only if it assigns at least one majority-yes and at least one majority-no label across the evaluated systems. This process retains 3,687 consistency-passed rubrics, of which 2,600 remain distinguishable and form the final set of consensus-derived gold rubrics. Using this final rubric set, we obtain clearly differentiated rankings across 10 deep research systems, with item-level pass rates ranging from 58.58\% to 22.23\%. More broadly, because the pipeline removes human-expert execution from rubric generation and evaluation, it is naturally scalable for benchmark evaluation, automatic system comparison, and future studies of evaluation-driven system improvement.
articles.titleCn: FinResearchBench II：一个基于共识生成的黄金标准评级的深度研究基准，用于区分财务报告质量
articles.abstractCn: 深度研究代理正越来越多地用于生成长篇财务报告，但大规模评估仍然受限于需要人类专家定义和执行高质量的评价标准。我们通过提出一个无需人类专家最终参与即可生成高质量评价标准的可扩展流程来解决这个问题。我们从104个真实用户查询构建了一个财务深度研究基准，并从模型生成的报告中自动合成14,450个针对查询的候选评价标准。为了证明可以移除人类专家执行评价标准，我们在样本子集上比较了三位人类专家的评价标准判断与三位LLM评委小组的评价标准判断，并表明基于LLM的评价与人类评价具有足够的一致性，足以替代大规模评价标准的筛选，包括在共同一致项上达到98.67%的标签级一致性。然后，我们通过两个过滤器推导出共识生成的黄金评价标准：一个严格的连续性过滤器，仅保留在相同查询下三位LLM评委一致同意的所有报告的评价标准；一个可区分性过滤器，仅保留在评估系统中至少分配一个多数同意和至少一个多数反对标签的评价标准。这个过程保留了3,687个通过连续性过滤器的评价标准，其中2,600个仍然可区分，并最终形成共识生成的黄金评价标准集。使用这个最终的评价标准集，我们在10个深度研究系统中获得了明显区分的排名，项目级通过率范围从58.58%到22.23%。更广泛地说，由于该流程移除了人类专家在评价标准生成和评估中的执行，因此它自然可扩展用于基准评估、自动系统比较以及未来基于评价驱动的系统改进研究。

articles.title: Speculate with Memory: Lossless Acceleration for LLM Agents
articles.abstract: Speculative execution accelerates LLM agents by using a smaller, cheaper model to predict and pre-launch the next step while the environment is idle. However, existing speculators are stateless and discard all information between tasks, preventing prediction quality from improving with experience. We equip the speculator with three online memory systems that learn from past agent trajectories: a contrastive transition table tracking action-sequence statistics, an episodic memory retrieving contextually similar segments, and a confusion tracker suppressing recurring errors. We evaluate this approach on six benchmarks spanning three speculation types: action prediction, observation prediction, and chained prediction. Memory-augmented speculation yields a 19--39\% relative accuracy improvement on action prediction and up to a $2.5\times$ increase on observation prediction tasks with repetitive action spaces. These gains grow continuously as memory accumulates and generalize across speculator models of varying cost. All speculation is lossless because it runs during idle time at zero added wall-clock cost, and the actor's trajectory is identical to non-speculative execution.
articles.titleCn: 以记忆进行推测：为LLM代理的无损加速
articles.abstractCn: 推测执行通过使用一个更小、更便宜的模型来预测和预启动下一步，从而加速了LLM代理，而环境处于空闲状态。然而，现有的推测器是无状态的，并在任务之间丢弃所有信息，这阻止了预测质量随着经验的积累而提高。我们为推测器配备了三个在线记忆系统，这些系统从过去的代理轨迹中学习：一个对比转换表跟踪动作序列统计信息，一个情景记忆检索上下文相似的片段，以及一个混淆跟踪器抑制重复出现的错误。我们在涵盖三种推测类型（动作预测、观察预测和链式预测）的六个基准测试上评估了这种方法：记忆增强推测在动作预测任务上带来了19--39%的相对精度提升，在具有重复动作空间的观察预测任务上最高提升了2.5倍。随着记忆的积累，这些收益会持续增长，并泛化到不同成本规格的推测器模型。所有推测都是无损的，因为它在空闲时间运行，没有任何额外的时间成本，并且代理的轨迹与非推测执行相同。

articles.title: Fin-Analyst at FinMMEval 2026 Task 3: A Live Hybrid Trading Agent with LLM Specialists and Rule-Based Signals
articles.abstract: Large language model (LLM) trading agents show promising performance in equity markets, yet remain narrowly focused on US equities with little evidence from live deployment. We present Fin-Analyst, a hybrid agent for FinMMEval 2026 Task 3: an eight-specialist LLM pipeline over news, SEC filings, fundamentals, analyst forecasts, technical indicators, and social sentiment, aggregated by a Meta-Agent for Tesla (TSLA), and a lightweight rule based three-signal vote for Bitcoin (BTC). On the final official leaderboard (accessed 2026-07-05), Fin-Analyst ranks first of all agents on TSLA with a +13.51% return, +28.33 points over Buy-and-Hold (Sharpe 4.10, 88% win rate), while the BTC vote ends flat yet well above a sharply falling baseline. Relative to the interim performance, the asset ranking reversed, indicating that short live windows yield volatility-sensitive rankings. Ablation identifies event-driven 8-K disclosures as the most influential TSLA signal. Error analysis shows that the memoryless agents repeat wrong calls for days at a time, and that the fixed-threshold BTC rules lost money by trading on noise in a sideways market while the LLM pipeline gained under similar conditions, motivating a memory-aware, LLM-based successor for both assets.
articles.comment: 14 pages, 7 tables, 1 figure. CLEF 2026 FinMMEval Task 3 Working Notes
articles.titleCn: FinMMEval 2026 任务3：一个具有LLM专家和基于规则的信号的实时混合交易代理
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLM）交易代理在股票市场表现出色，但主要集中于美国股票，且缺乏实际部署的证据。我们提出了Fin-Analyst，一个用于FinMMEval 2026任务3的混合代理：一个包含八个专家的LLM流水线，涵盖新闻、SEC文件、基本面、分析师预测、技术指标和社会情绪，由一个Meta-Agent聚合用于特斯拉（TSLA），以及一个基于规则的轻量级三信号投票用于比特币（BTC）。在最终官方排行榜（访问日期：2026-07-05）上，Fin-Analyst在TSLA上排名第一，回报率为+13.51%，比买入持有策略高出+28.33点（夏普比率4.10，胜率88%），而BTC投票结果持平但远高于急剧下跌的基准线。与中期表现相比，资产排名发生了逆转，表明短期实时窗口会产生对波动敏感的排名。消融实验表明，事件驱动的8-K披露是影响TSLA的最重要信号。错误分析显示，无记忆代理会连续数日重复错误的交易决策，而固定阈值的BTC规则在横盘市场中因交易噪音而亏损，而LLM流水线在类似条件下则获利，这促使我们为这两种资产开发一个基于记忆感知的LLM后继者。
